messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: One standing 'Recert' Telegram topic where the human validates/amends/deletes Gherkin recert scenarios in-chat (full move out of the PWA)
How it works: The oldest un-reviewed scenario is posted into the Recert topic, one at a time
